RegLoan Bank — Income / Bank Statement Verification Document VER-0004 Page 3 of 3 Statement of Account — continued Date Description Debit ($) Credit ($) Balance ($) 15/06/2025 UTILITY BILL - - 5,990 13/04/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY - - 5,990 05/04/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 249 1,531 7,272 08/02/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - 835 8,107 24/10/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT - 1,259 9,366 15/04/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 855 1,608 10,119 16/03/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT - 1,519 11,638 15/03/2025 UTILITY BILL 821 1,044 11,861 13/12/2025 UTILITY BILL - 2,412 14,273 02/12/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY - 429 14,702 19/06/2025 UTILITY BILL 218 2,171 16,655 08/10/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 227 112 16,540 18/11/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT 814 - 15,726 23/08/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT 829 - 14,897 09/11/2025 UTILITY BILL - - 14,897 12/12/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT - - 14,897 11/01/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - 1,739 16,636 20/03/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT 312 1,534 17,858
